characters.name: Alice
characters.description: She is the great-grandaughter of the original Alice and is a young baker who opened up a bakery in Wonderland Ancestral Name: She has the same name as her great-grandmother, Alice. Hair of Gold, Heart of Gold: She's aNice Girlwith blond hair. Identical Granddaughter: She looks almost exactly like her great-grandmother, the only different being that her eyes are noticeably bigger. The Kids Are American: She speaks with an American accent, compared to her British-accent great-grandmother.

characters.name: Queen of Hearts
characters.description: The ruler of Wonderland and Rosa's mother. Adaptational Attractiveness: The original Queen of Hearts is aFat Bastardwith aGonkface. In the series, the queen is quite the looker with a slimer body and a pretty face. Adaptational Nationality: The original queen is Caucasian while this queen is Latina. Adaptational Nice Girl: She has her moments, but she is far more pleasant and easier to get along with than most interpretation of the Queen of Hearts. Drama Queen: Oh big time. Although, not as bad as her predecessor

characters.name: Cheshire Cat
characters.description: Adaptational Nice Guy: In the original film, Cheshire's morality is questionable at best helping Alice find the White Rabbit, in his own mad cap way, but at the same times he does get her trouble with the Queen of Hearts several times. But here, he is nothing but helpful and friendly towards Alice and her friends but still remains as zany as ever. Cheshire Cat Grin: Well, what do you expect?
